title: Clear snow for elderly residents on Pine St.
whyItMatters: Heavy overnight snowfall has trapped several elderly residents, preventing them from accessing medical appointments and grocery deliveries.

title: Assist visual-impaired commuters at Station B
whyItMatters: The tactile paving is under repair at Station B, making it difficult for visually impaired commuters to navigate safely.

title: Translate community health flyers
whyItMatters: New winter health guidelines need to be translated into Spanish and Mandarin to ensure all community members are informed.
